svg.title: everflow — primary lockup (dark)
svg.desc: Three chevrons stepping forward, followed by the wordmark "everflow". Dark-mode variant: trailing chevrons and wordmark in white, leading chevron in merge-green.

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
